locations.name: 塞内加尔
locations.summary: 塞内加尔共和国（法語：République du Sénégal），通稱塞內加爾（法語：Sénégal），是西非国家，位于塞内加尔河的南岸，首都达喀尔。它的西边是大西洋，北边是毛里塔尼亚，东边是馬利，南边是几内亚和几内亚比绍。冈比亚在塞内…

locations.name: 南蘇丹
locations.summary: 南蘇丹共和國（英語：Republic of South Sudan），通稱南蘇丹（英語：South Sudan），是非洲東北部一個內陸國家，2011年從蘇丹獨立。東面是埃塞俄比亞，南面是剛果民主共和國、肯亞和烏干達，西面是中非共和國，北面…

relations.subject: Cricket warbler
relations.evidence: The cricket warbler occurs in the Sahel Zone from southern Mauritania and northern Senegal east to South Sudan and northern Eritrea. They have recently been found breeding in the Western Sahara at Oued Jenna near Aousserd.{{cite journal | author1 =Amezian, M

relations.subject: Cricket warbler
relations.evidence: The cricket warbler breeds in thorn scrub, especially acacia scrub, it even extends into true desert so long as there is sufficient vegetation and into savanna with broad-leafed trees but avoids grassy plains or dense bush
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
